cases.question: 2025年12月的财务口径确认净收入是多少

golden.label: fin_daily_revenue net
golden.sql: SELECT sum(net_revenue) FROM fin_daily_revenue WHERE dt BETWEEN '2025-12-01' AND '2025-12-31'

cases.question: 各广告渠道的 ROI 排名

golden.label: mart_channel_daily roi
golden.sql: SELECT channel_name FROM (SELECT channel_name, sum(gmv_attributed)/NULLIF(sum(cost),0) AS roi FROM mart_channel_daily GROUP BY channel_name) t WHERE roi IS NOT NULL ORDER BY roi DESC LIMIT 3

cases.value_hint: tmp_campaign_roi_analysis 的 roi 列全 NULL, 掉进去就答不出
